cards.name: Build
descI: Build **1 building** with a maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Available: **Kiosk, pavilion, aquariums, standard enclosures** and **petting zoo**.
You may pay <MONEY:3> to build 1 additional pavilion.
descII: Build **1 or more different buildings** with a total maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Newly available: **Large Bird Aviary** and **Reptile House**.
You may pay <MONEY:2> to build 1 additional pavilion.
tooltip: <SIDE_I> You may build 1 additional pavilion. You may do this even if you build a pavilion as part of your regular build action and even if you exceed the strength of your build action by 1 by building this pavilion. Pay a total cost of 3 money for the additional pavilion (the regular cost of 2 plus an extra cost of 1). You may build all buildings (including the additional pavilion) in an order of your choice.
<SIDE_II> Same as Side I, but the cost for the additional pavilion is reduced to 2 money (the regular cost).

cards.name: Build
descI: Build **1 building** with a maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>**+1**.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Available: **Kiosk, pavilion, aquariums, standard enclosures** and **petting zoo**.
descII: Build **1 or more different buildings** with a total maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>**+1**.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Newly available: **Large Bird Aviary** and **Reptile House**.
You may build more than 1 of the **same standard enclosure**.
tooltip: <SIDE_I> You may build with a strength of X+1.

<SIDE_II> Same as Side I, but you may build as many of each standard enclosure as you want (the limit of X+1 strength does still apply). This does not allow you to build more than 1 kiosk and 1 pavilion.

cards.name: Association
descI: Perform **1 association task** with a maximum value of <STRENGTH:X>.
At <STRENGTH:5> you may place this action card on <STRENGTH:1> and instead perform another action.
descII: Perform **1 or more different association tasks** with a total maximum value of <STRENGTH:X>.
In addition, you may make 1 **donation**.
Instead of making a donation, you may <TAKE-IN-RANGE-OR-DECK>.
tooltip: At level I, you can support conservation projects either on the board or from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can also support conservation project in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.

<SIDE_I> When using this action card at a strength of 5, you may opt to do nothing but move the action card to slot 1 and then do another action after that (Animal ability Determination). You do not need to have an association worker in your supply to do that.

<SIDE_II> Instead of making a donation, you may draw 1 card from the deck or from within reputation range. Do this at the end of the Association action and you must have performed at least 1 association task during this action to do this (just like you would need to make a donation).

cards.name: Animals
descI: Play animals cards.
ANIMALS-I
The **first animal** you play cost <MONEY:2> less.
descII: Play animals.
ANIMALS-II
Additionally, for each animal you play, you may pay <MONEY:2> to gain <APPEAL:1>.
tooltip: At level I, you can play animal cards only from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can play cards either from your hand or in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.
<SIDE_I> Reduce the cost of the first animal you play with this action by 2 (to a minimum of 0).

<SIDE_II> For each animal you play with this action and only once per animal, you may pay 2 additional money to gain 1 additional appeal. (Do not reduce the cost of the first animal like you did on Side I.)

cards.name: Sponsors
descI: Play **1** sponsors card with a maximum level of <STRENGTH:X>.
SPONSORS
Break <STRBREAK:X>, gain <MONEY:X>.
SEPARATOR
If you **gain money** during this action, gain <MONEY:3> more.
descII: Play **1 or more** sponsors cards with a total maximum level of <STRENGTH:X>** + 1**.
SPONSORS
Break <STRBREAK:X>, gain **2x**<MONEY:X>.
SEPARATOR
If you **gain money** during this action, gain <MONEY:5> more.
tooltip: At level I, you can play sponsor cards only from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can play cards either from your hand or in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.

Gain X extra money when you gain money because of this Sponsors action (no matter how much money and from how many sources). That includes using the break option, playing a Sponsor card that gives you money itself, and any effects giving you money that are triggered because of a Sponsor card you play. (<SIDE_I> X=3 money; <SIDE_II> X=5 money)

cards.name: Animals
descI: Play animals cards.
ANIMALS-I
If you have no Animal card in hand after finishing this action: **Hunter 4**.
descII: Play animals cards.
ANIMALS-II
If you have no Animal card in hand after finishing this action: **Hunter 6**.
tooltip: At level I, you can play animal cards only from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can play cards either from your hand or in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.

After finishing this action, if you have no Animal cards in your hand, you may reveal the X topmost cards of the deck. Choose 1 Animal card from these and add it to your hand. Discard the other cards. (Animal ability Hunter X) (<SIDE_I> X=4 cards; <SIDE_II> X=6 cards)

data.log: Starting the first round of action cards draft phase.

After finishing this action, if you have no Animal cards in your hand, you may reveal the X topmost cards of the deck. Choose 1 Animal card from these and add it to your hand. Discard the other cards. (Animal ability Hunter X) (<SIDE_I> X=4 cards; <SIDE_II> X=6 cards)

cards.name: Build
descI: Build **1 building** with a maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Available: **Kiosk, pavilion, aquariums, standard enclosures** and **petting zoo**.
You may pay <MONEY:3> to build 1 additional pavilion.
descII: Build **1 or more different buildings** with a total maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Newly available: **Large Bird Aviary** and **Reptile House**.
You may pay <MONEY:2> to build 1 additional pavilion.
tooltip: <SIDE_I> You may build 1 additional pavilion. You may do this even if you build a pavilion as part of your regular build action and even if you exceed the strength of your build action by 1 by building this pavilion. Pay a total cost of 3 money for the additional pavilion (the regular cost of 2 plus an extra cost of 1). You may build all buildings (including the additional pavilion) in an order of your choice.
<SIDE_II> Same as Side I, but the cost for the additional pavilion is reduced to 2 money (the regular cost).

cards.name: Animals
descI: Play animals cards.
ANIMALS-I
The **first animal** you play cost <MONEY:2> less.
descII: Play animals.
ANIMALS-II
Additionally, for each animal you play, you may pay <MONEY:2> to gain <APPEAL:1>.
tooltip: At level I, you can play animal cards only from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can play cards either from your hand or in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.
<SIDE_I> Reduce the cost of the first animal you play with this action by 2 (to a minimum of 0).

<SIDE_II> For each animal you play with this action and only once per animal, you may pay 2 additional money to gain 1 additional appeal. (Do not reduce the cost of the first animal like you did on Side I.)

cards.name: Association
descI: Perform **1 association task** with a maximum value of <STRENGTH:X>.
At <STRENGTH:5> you may place this action card on <STRENGTH:1> and instead perform another action.
descII: Perform **1 or more different association tasks** with a total maximum value of <STRENGTH:X>.
In addition, you may make 1 **donation**.
Instead of making a donation, you may <TAKE-IN-RANGE-OR-DECK>.
tooltip: At level I, you can support conservation projects either on the board or from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can also support conservation project in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.

<SIDE_I> When using this action card at a strength of 5, you may opt to do nothing but move the action card to slot 1 and then do another action after that (Animal ability Determination). You do not need to have an association worker in your supply to do that.

<SIDE_II> Instead of making a donation, you may draw 1 card from the deck or from within reputation range. Do this at the end of the Association action and you must have performed at least 1 association task during this action to do this (just like you would need to make a donation).

cards.name: Sponsors
descI: Play **1** sponsors card with a maximum level of <STRENGTH:X>.
SPONSORS
Break <STRBREAK:X>, gain <MONEY:X>.
SEPARATOR
If you **gain money** during this action, gain <MONEY:3> more.
descII: Play **1 or more** sponsors cards with a total maximum level of <STRENGTH:X>** + 1**.
SPONSORS
Break <STRBREAK:X>, gain **2x**<MONEY:X>.
SEPARATOR
If you **gain money** during this action, gain <MONEY:5> more.
tooltip: At level I, you can play sponsor cards only from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can play cards either from your hand or in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.

Gain X extra money when you gain money because of this Sponsors action (no matter how much money and from how many sources). That includes using the break option, playing a Sponsor card that gives you money itself, and any effects giving you money that are triggered because of a Sponsor card you play. (<SIDE_I> X=3 money; <SIDE_II> X=5 money)

cards.name: Build
descI: Build **1 building** with a maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>**+1**.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Available: **Kiosk, pavilion, aquariums, standard enclosures** and **petting zoo**.
descII: Build **1 or more different buildings** with a total maximum size of <STRENGTH:X>**+1**.
Pay <MONEY:2> per space.
Newly available: **Large Bird Aviary** and **Reptile House**.
You may build more than 1 of the **same standard enclosure**.
tooltip: <SIDE_I> You may build with a strength of X+1.

<SIDE_II> Same as Side I, but you may build as many of each standard enclosure as you want (the limit of X+1 strength does still apply). This does not allow you to build more than 1 kiosk and 1 pavilion.

cards.name: Animals
descI: Play animals cards.
ANIMALS-I
If you have no Animal card in hand after finishing this action: **Hunter 4**.
descII: Play animals cards.
ANIMALS-II
If you have no Animal card in hand after finishing this action: **Hunter 6**.
tooltip: At level I, you can play animal cards only from your hand <HAND-CARDS>. At level II, you can play cards either from your hand or in your reputation range by paying **the folder number as additional cost** <HAND-CARDS> <TAKE-IN-RANGE-FOLDER-COST>.

After finishing this action, if you have no Animal cards in your hand, you may reveal the X topmost cards of the deck. Choose 1 Animal card from these and add it to your hand. Discard the other cards. (Animal ability Hunter X) (<SIDE_I> X=4 cards; <SIDE_II> X=6 cards)
